title: croton pullei var. pullei
intro: Croton pullei var. pullei, also known as the Pullei's Croton, is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Croton pullei var. pullei include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
